title: Make money easily
body: This is a popular catchphrase used in online business, and I want to give it a try. I’ve created a new domain [www.casisi.com](http://www.casisi.com)—a “casisi” is a place where you almost **don’t** win, and a “casisi” is another where you **do** win (original, right?). I’ve installed WordPress, signed up for an online casino affiliate program, and written (drawing inspiration from other sites) a few articles on the topic (Poker, Roulette, Blackjack, etc.). Let’s see how it goes; I’ll keep you posted. And if anyone has any suggestions, comments, or criticism, please share them—that’s what this blog is for.
